title: jacobaea ornata
intro: Jacobaea ornata, also known as the Saw-wort or Sawtooth, is a plant species within the daisy family (Asteraceae) that is native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant contains sesquiterpene lactones, which have been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Jacobaea ornata include its potential to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its ability to act as an antiseptic to promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Jacobaea ornata can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used to treat a range of health conditions, including skin irritations and respiratory issues.
